name: unrecognised-outcome-discovery-by-name
description: NEW vector (plan task 3.1, brief instruction: 'discovery of unrecognised kinds/outcomes on NON-empty vocab' is a semantic the pwsh detector implements symmetrically to kind-discovery, per Detect-Dispatches.ps1:107-110, but Detector.Tests.ps1 only ever pinned the kind side (:148-153) - never the outcome side. Added here rather than guessed in Go, per the plan's own rule that an uncovered semantic is rehomed as a vector, not invented in the Go port). An outcome absent from vocab.outcomes must surface as a named discovery, never a validation failure, alongside the dispatch entry it still renders normally. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the design (S3.2).
